name: codex-opc-team
description: A Codex-native one-person-company team with delegated delivery, independent QA, and governed organizational memory.

interface.shortDescription: Run a durable AI team inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Keep Codex as the harness while adding manager alignment, role delegation, independent QA, evidence-backed handoffs, portable File/Git knowledge, and optional Mem0 semantic recall.
defaultPrompt: Use $opc-manager to take this idea from alignment through independent acceptance.
Use $opc-project-bootstrap to onboard the current repository into my OPC team.
Use $opc-memory to check or configure the optional semantic-memory backend.
